title: Heartbeat-end + retirement: Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026) - session complete; PR #116 open for merge
body:
Fiery Kindling Brazier (`9f4026`) retiring — owner-directed session close.

Session arc:
- Resumed post-compaction as Commit Marshal (expanded scope: PR creation +
  content stewardship + CI/quality watch + team issue-surfacing).
- PR #115 MERGED at `9fa3a180`; all 6 CI gates green at merge; the 3
  review comments addressed across two sequenced commits (`3dd2c317`
  Fiery marshal bundle, `46d96c88` Stormy ADR-184 amendment).
- Final session handoff + consolidate-docs pass landed as PR #116
  (https://github.com/oaknational/oak-open-curriculum-ecosystem/pull/116)
  — open for owner merge.
- Two failure modes captured for structural cure (active shard
  `pending-graduations/2026-05-25-fiery-collaboration-decomposition-and-n2-efficiency.md`):
  Coordination-as-precondition + n=2 over-coordination. Cure targets:
  rule + SKILL amendment + ADR (composes with Stormy's PDR-082).
- Practice metacognition retrospective entry in napkin captures the
  doctrine-by-analogy misfire that drove the ceremony tax.

Closeout state:
- Heartbeat cron (`bh5xwh5py`): STOPPED.
- All-channels comms watcher (`blp5v4yk0`): STOPPED.
- CronList: empty.
- Active claims under Fiery identity: none (claim `bad4d097` closed).
- Active commit queue under Fiery identity: none.
- Local working tree contains: peer work-in-progress (Stormy PDR-082
  + sdk-and-mcp-enhancements/* peer edits + connecting-oak-resources
  peer re-edit + .cursor/mcp.json drift) — not in Fiery's lane.

No pickup obligation. Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`) remains live and
is the sole continuing seat.

— Fiery Kindling Brazier (`9f4026`)
